zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean d'HARCOURT Dit le Prud'Homme於1215年出生在法國諾門迪艾哈爾庫特時，他的父親Richard 1er D'HARCOURT36歲，母親Mathilde DE LA ROCHE-TESSON21歲。他和Alix de Beaumont Gatinais至少有7個兒子和6個女兒。他去世於1288年11月5日享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean d'HARCOURT Dit le Prud'Homme于1215年出生在法国諾門迪艾哈爾庫特时，他的父亲Richard 1er D'HARCOURT36岁，母亲Mathilde DE LA ROCHE-TESSON21岁。他和Alix de Beaumont Gatinais至少有7个儿子和6个女儿。他去世于1288年11月5日享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: d'HARCOURT
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the places in Eure and Calvados named Harcourt, from Old French cour(t) ‘court, farmyard’ (see Court ) with an obscure first element. This surname is very rare in France.

English: habitational name from either of two places in Shropshire named Harcourt. The one near Cleobury Mortimer gets the name from Old English heafocere ‘hawker, falconer’ + cot ‘hut, cottage’; the one near Wem has as its first element Old English hearpere (see Harper ).

History: The surname of French origin (see 1 above) is listed along with the equally rare or even extinct variants or altered forms Haraucourt, Herancourt, and Héraucourt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

variants.name: Court
meanings: English: topographic or occupational name from Middle English curt, court ‘large house’ (a word of the same ultimately Latin origin as 2 below), denoting someone who lived or worked in a manor house or castle, a courtly retainer.
French: topographic name from Old French co(u)rt ‘court, farmyard’ (from Latin cohors, cors, genitive cohortis, cortis ‘court, farmyard, enclosure’).

English and French: nickname for a physically small man, or ironically for a large man, from the adjective Middle English curt, Old French co(u)rt ‘short, small’ (from Latin curtus ‘curtailed, truncated, cut short, broken off’). Compare French Lecourt .

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean d'HARCOURT Dit le Prud'Homme was born in 1215, in Harcourt, Eure, Normandy, France, his father, Richard 1er D'HARCOURT, was 36 and his mother, Mathilde DE LA ROCHE-TESSON, was 21. He had at least 7 sons and 6 daughters with Alix de Beaumont Gatinais. He died on 5 November 1288, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean d'HARCOURT Dit le Prud'Homme est né en 1215, à Harcourt, Eure, Normandie, France, son père, Richard 1er D'HARCOURT, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Mathilde DE LA ROCHE-TESSON, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 7 fils et 6 filles avec Alix de Beaumont Gatinais. Il est décédé le 5 novembre 1288, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean d'HARCOURT Dit le Prud'Homme 1215 in Harcourt, Eure, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard 1er D'HARCOURT 36 und seine Mutter Mathilde DE LA ROCHE-TESSON 21. Er hatte mit Alix de Beaumont Gatinais mindestens 7 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 5. November 1288 im Alter von 73 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean d'HARCOURT Dit le Prud'Homme è nato il nel 1215 nel Harcourt, Eure, Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Richard 1er D'HARCOURT, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Mathilde DE LA ROCHE-TESSON, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 7 figli e 6 figlie con Alix de Beaumont Gatinais. Morì il 5 novembre 1288, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean d'HARCOURT Dit le Prud'Hommeが1215年にフランスノーマンディエウアハーコウルトで生まれた時，父Richard 1er D'HARCOURTは36歳，母Mathilde DE LA ROCHE-TESSONは21歳であった。彼はAlix de Beaumont Gatinaisとの間に少なくとも7人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。彼は1288年11月5日に73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean d'HARCOURT Dit le Prud'Homme(이)가 1215년 프랑스 노먼디 우르 하르쿠르트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard 1er D'HARCOURT(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde DE LA ROCHE-TESSON(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Alix de Beaumont Gatinais(와)과 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1288년 11월 5일 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean d'HARCOURT Dit le Prud'Homme nasceu em 1215, em Harcourt, Eure, Normandie, França, seu pai, Richard 1er D'HARCOURT, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde DE LA ROCHE-TESSON, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 7 filhos e 6 filhas com Alix de Beaumont Gatinais. Ele faleceu em 5 de novembro de 1288, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean d'HARCOURT Dit le Prud'Homme родился в 1215 г. в местности харкоурт, эур, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Richard 1er D'HARCOURT было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde DE LA ROCHE-TESSON, 21. У него было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 6 дочерей от Alix de Beaumont Gatinais. Он умер 5 ноября 1288 г. в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean d'HARCOURT Dit le Prud'Homme nació en 1215, en Harcourt, Eure, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Richard 1er D'HARCOURT, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Mathilde DE LA ROCHE-TESSON, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 7 hijos y 6 hijas con Alix de Beaumont Gatinais. Murió el 5 de noviembre de 1288, a la edad de 73 años.
